tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]                                             [ch]F[/ch]
Please don't come around talking bout that you love me[/tab]
Cause that love shit just ain't for me
[tab]                                 [ch]Bbm[/ch]
And I don't wanna hear that you adore me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Bbm[/ch]                                       [ch]F[/ch]
And I know that all you're doing is running your mind games[/tab]
Don't you know my game beats these games
[tab]                             [ch]Bbm[/ch]
So your best bet is to be straight with me[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Bbm[/ch]
So you say you wanna talk, let's talk[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]
If you won't talk, I'll walk, yeah it's like that[/tab]
Got a new man, he's waiting out back
[tab]    [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Now what, what you think about that[/tab]
Now when I say I'm through, I'm through
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]
Basically, I'm through with you[/tab]
What ya wanna say, had to have it your way, had to play games
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]
Now you're begging me to stay[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]
There you go, looking pitiful[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Just because I let you go[/tab]
There you go, talking bout you want me back
[tab]       [ch]Bbm[/ch]
But sometimes it be's like that, so[/tab]
[tab]                                                      [ch]F[/ch]
There you go, talking bout you miss me so, that you love me so, why I let ya go[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]Bbm[/ch]
There you go cause your lies got old, look at you[/tab]
There you go

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]                                             [ch]F[/ch]
Please don't come around talking bout how you changed[/tab]
How you said good-bye to what's-her-name
[tab]                            [ch]Bbm[/ch]
All it sounds like to me is new game[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Bbm[/ch]                                                [ch]F[/ch]
And I was right when I thought I'd be much better off without you[/tab]
[tab]                                                         [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Had to get myself from round you, cause my life was all about you[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]
So you say you wanna talk, I don't[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]
Say you wanna change, I won't[/tab]
N.C.
Yeah, it's like that
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Had your chance, won't take ya back[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Now what, what ya think about that[/tab]
And when I say I'm through, I'm through
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]
Basically I'm through wit you[/tab]
What ya wanna say
[tab]                                            [ch]Bbm[/ch]                      N.C.
Had to have it your way, had to play games, now you're begging me to stay[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]Bbm[/ch]
There you go, looking pitiful[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Just because I let you go[/tab]
There you go, talking bout you want me back
[tab]       [ch]Bbm[/ch]
But sometimes it be's like that, so[/tab]
[tab]                                                      [ch]F[/ch]
There you go, talking bout you miss me so, that you love me so, why I let ya go[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]Bbm[/ch]
There you go cause your lies got old, look at you[/tab]
There you go

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Ebm[/ch]                                           [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Oh, don't you wish you could turn the hands of time[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]F[/ch]
Don't you wish you still were mine[/tab]
Don't you wish I'd take you back

[tab]          [ch]Bbm[/ch]         [ch]Cm[/ch]         [ch]Db[/ch]          [ch]Eb[/ch]       [ch]Ebm[/ch]
Don't you wish that things were simple like that, oh[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Didn't miss a good thing till it was gone[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]F[/ch]
But I knew it wouldn't be long, till you came running back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]
Missing my love, there you go[/tab]

[Chorus] (x3)
[tab]          [ch]Bbm[/ch]
There you go, looking pitiful[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Just because I let you go[/tab]
There you go, talking bout you want me back
[tab]       [ch]Bbm[/ch]
But sometimes it be's like that, so[/tab]
[tab]                                                      [ch]F[/ch]
There you go, talking bout you miss me so, that you love me so, why I let ya go[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]Bbm[/ch]
There you go cause your lies got old, look at you[/tab]
There you go
